papers.title_en: Mo1844 ACUTE PANCREATITIS OUTCOME PREDICTION WITH DEEP LEARNING AND RADIOMICS
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了利用深度学习和影像组学技术预测急性胰腺炎（AP）临床预后的方法。通过整合医学影像的深度特征与定量组学数据，研究旨在构建高效的预测模型，以实现对AP严重程度及并发症的早期识别。该研究展示了人工智能在辅助急性胰腺炎风险分层和临床决策中的潜力。
papers.abstract_en:
arXiv did not provide an abstract for this paper.

---

papers.title_en: Integrating Radiomics and Computational Pathology to Predict Early Recurrence of Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma and Uncover Its Biological Basis in Tumor …
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胰腺导管腺癌（PDAC）术后早期复发预测难的问题，提出了一种整合影像组学与计算病理学的Rad-Path模型。通过分析影像学特征与病理形态学数据，该模型不仅显著提升了早期复发的预测准确性，还进一步揭示了复发背后的肿瘤生物学基础。这一研究为PDAC患者的术后风险分层和精准医疗提供了重要的技术支持和理论依据。
papers.abstract_en: Background: Accurate prediction of early recurrence (ER) after radical resectionremains a critical challenge in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC). This studyaimed to develop and validate an integrated radiomic‐pathology (Rad‐Path) model …

papers.title_en: Interpretable Semantic Medical Image Segmentation with Style and Confidence
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗图像分割中存在的标注数据匮乏及深度学习模型“黑盒”特性导致的可解释性不足问题，提出了一种结合风格特征与置信度评估的新型语义分割框架。该方法不仅在小样本情况下提升了分割精度，还通过量化模型的不确定性和风格一致性，为临床决策提供了直观的解释依据，有效增强了模型在医疗场景中的透明度与可靠性。
papers.abstract_en: The scarcity of semantically labelled data presents major challenges for medicalimage segmentation using deep learning models, and the” black-box” nature ofthese models inherently limits their interpretability during clinical deployment. To …

papers.title_en: QPath: A Question-Aware Multi-Resolution Vision Language Framework for Computational Pathology
papers.tldr: 本研究针对计算病理学中视觉问答（VQA）任务，提出了QPath框架。针对现有模型仅依赖单分辨率分析而忽略病理图像多尺度特征的局限性，QPath引入了问题感知多分辨率机制，能够根据问题需求动态整合不同尺度的视觉信息。该框架在病理VQA任务上取得了显著提升，为处理复杂的病理图像提供了更精准的多模态理解方案。
papers.abstract_en: Computational pathology has recently advanced through the use of multimodal largelanguage models (MLLMs) for visual question answering (VQA). However, mostexisting approaches rely on single-resolution analysis of pathology images, limiting …

papers.title_en: PeFoMed: Parameter efficient fine-tuning of multimodal large language models for medical CXR
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗胸部X光（CXR）图像分析的专业需求，提出了PeFoMed框架。该框架通过参数高效微调（PEFT）技术，将通用多模态大模型适配于医疗影像领域，旨在解决全量微调计算成本高昂的问题。PeFoMed在保持较低资源消耗的同时，显著提升了模型在CXR报告生成和辅助诊断中的准确性，为医疗专用大模型的高效开发提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) represent an evolutionary expansion inthe capabilities of traditional large language models, enabling them to tacklechallenges that surpass the scope of purely text-based applications. Recent works …

papers.title_en: SVCF: Enabling Zero-Shot Correction of Reasoning Steps in Multi-Modal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在处理复杂推理任务时容易出现逻辑偏差的问题，本文提出了SVCF框架。该框架专注于实现推理步骤的零样本纠错，无需额外的模型训练或微调。通过在推理过程中引入反馈机制，SVCF能够有效识别并修正多模态环境下的步骤错误，显著提升了模型在复杂逻辑任务中的准确性和可靠性，为增强MLLM的推理能力提供了高效的新方案。
papers.abstract_en: The latest advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) havedemonstrated remarkable performance in complex reasoning tasks. However, withthe increasing complexity of problems and the diversification of modalities, MLLMs …

papers.title_en: DIRA: Deep High-Rank Adaptation of Pre-Trained Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型微调中低秩适配器（如LoRA）通常仅依赖单层网络且秩受限的问题，本文提出了DIRA（深度高秩适配）。该方法通过引入深层结构和更高秩的参数化方式，在保持参数效率的同时，显著提升了模型在复杂任务上的微调效果。研究证明，增加适配器的深度和秩能更有效地捕捉预训练模型中的知识，为高效微调提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: A common practice in fine-tuning large language models is to freeze the weights ofthe original pre-trained model while optimizing a low-rank adapter. However, existingadapters typically rely on single-layer networks, whereas empirical evidence …

papers.title_en: Game-Theoretic Insights into Multi-Agent LLM Debate for Enhanced Clinical Question Answering
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在临床问答中可靠性不足的问题，引入博弈论视角探讨多智能体辩论（MAD）机制。通过让多个LLM智能体相互评价并整合答案，研究深入分析了辩论过程中的交互逻辑与博弈行为。该方法不仅显著提升了医学问答的准确性，还为理解多智能体协作提供了理论支撑，是增强医疗AI系统可靠性的重要贡献。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) have advanced in medical question answering, yetensuring reliability remains challenging. We study multi-agent debate (MAD), wheremultiple LLM agents critique and aggregate each other's answers. Our game …

papers.title_en: WebCompass: Towards Multimodal Web Coding Evaluation for Code Language Models
papers.tldr: 随着大语言模型向交互式编程智能体演进，现有的 Web 编程评估基准主要局限于文本生成和静态指标，无法全面衡量模型在多模态环境下的端到端开发能力。本文提出了 WebCompass，这是一个全新的多模态 Web 编程评估基准，旨在通过更复杂的交互场景和多模态输入，更真实地评估代码语言模型在实际网页开发任务中的表现，填补了现有评估体系的空白。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models are rapidly evolving into interactive coding agents capableof end-to-end web coding, yet existing benchmarks evaluate only narrow slices ofthis capability, typically text-conditioned generation with static-correctness metrics …

papers.title_en: Pause or Fabricate? Training Language Models for Grounded Reasoning
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型在输入信息不完整时容易产生幻觉（即“编造”信息）的问题，本文提出了一种训练方法，旨在让模型在面对不确定或缺失信息时能够“暂停”或进行基于事实的推理。研究通过改进训练策略，使模型在复杂推理任务中更加可靠，减少了自信但错误的结论，提升了模型在现实场景中的落地能力。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models have achieved remarkable progress on complex reasoningtasks. However, they often implicitly fabricate information when inputs areincomplete, producing confident but unreliable conclusions--a failure mode we term …

papers.title_en: SSL-R1: Self-Supervised Visual Reinforcement Post-Training for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在强化学习后训练中过度依赖语言先验和昂贵人工标注奖励的问题，提出了SSL-R1。这是一种自监督视觉强化学习方法，旨在通过自监督机制减少对外部验证信号的依赖，显著提升了模型在多模态任务中的推理能力，为MLLM的高效后训练提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has demonstrated thegreat potential of enhancing the reasoning abilities in multimodal large languagemodels (MLLMs). However, the reliance on language-centric priors and expensive …

papers.title_en: Thinking Like a Botanist: Challenging Multimodal Language Models with Intent-Driven Chain-of-Inquiry
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态语言模型在专业视觉分析中的不足，提出了一种模仿植物学家思维的“意图驱动查询链”（Chain-of-Inquiry）方法。该方法通过结构化、基于证据的自适应提问流程，在植物病理学领域挑战并评估模型的图像分析能力，旨在提升模型在复杂专家任务中的推理深度与准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Vision evaluations are typically done through multi-step processes. In mostcontemporary fields, experts analyze images using structured, evidence-basedadaptive questioning. In plant pathology, botanists inspect leaf images, identify visual …

papers.title_en: Fine-Grained Analysis of Shared Syntactic Mechanisms in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究深入探讨了语言模型内部机制是否符合语言学中的跨结构原则。通过对模型处理不同句法结构时的内部表示进行细粒度分析，研究者旨在揭示模型在处理如主谓一致等任务时，是否在不同语境下复用了相同的神经机制。研究发现模型在处理相似句法逻辑时表现出一定的机制共享，这为理解大模型的语言习得与泛化能力提供了重要见解。
papers.abstract_en: While language models demonstrate sophisticated syntactic capabilities, the extentto which their internal mechanisms align with cross-constructional principles studiedin linguistics remains poorly understood. This study investigates whether models …
